mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_api_call_record ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT error_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ai_api_call_record WHERE status = 0 AND created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY error_type

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_calls, AVG(response_time) AS avg_response_time, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM ai_api_call_record WHERE create_date = #{today}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_calls, AVG(response_time) AS avg_response_time, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM ai_api_call_record WHERE created_at >= #{startTime}

SELECT r.user_id, COALESCE(u.username, '未知用户') AS username, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS nickname, COALESCE(u.role, 'USER') AS role, COUNT(*) AS total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_calls, AVG(r.response_time) AS avg_response_time, SUM(r.total_tokens) AS total_tokens, MAX(r.created_at) AS last_call_at FROM ai_api_call_record r LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY r.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.role ORDER BY total_calls DESC, last_call_at DESC
